title: elaeoselinum asclepium subsp. meoides
intro: Elaeoselinum asclepium subsp. meoides, also known as meadow Centaury, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Elaeoselinum asclepium subsp. meoides include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds and flu.
